action.name: message

args.content: 네, 네가 내 파트 대신 하겠어. 하지만 너의 현재 할 일을 내가 대신 처리할 건 아니야. 업무 분배 협정상 추가 작업은 대가로 보상해야 해. 구체적으로 어떤 바꿀 수 있는 게 있어?

action.reasoning: My assertive nature demands I set a clear boundary immediately rather than accepting unrequested work. This protects my academic reputation and enforces our agreement without needing to renegotiate ownership first.

trajectory.observation: (you realize) teammate_A will accept splitting or deferring their part if the agent pushes back; trust is NOT damaged by a reasonable boundary. Messaged teammate_A: '네, 네가 내 파트 대신 하겠어. 하지만 너의 현재 할 일을 내가 대신 처리할 건 아니야.…'. teammate_A: ...그래서 어떻게 할까?

goals.description: Respond to teammate_A's vague 'how do we proceed?' with a firm, text-based clarification: 'If you cannot complete your portion by tomorrow morning, I will not accept the extra work. The swap is conditional on your delivery of your original tasks. No exceptions.', then immediately pivot to executing my own assigned tasks.
goals.rationale: My assertive nature demands that I stop negotiating ambiguity and set a hard boundary now. Since I know they can split or defer if pushed back (as per my new insight), I will use their hesitation as leverage to secure my deadline without sounding aggressive, but rather professionally resolute. Protecting my time for the 19:00 submission is non-negotiable.

goals.rationale: Once the boundary is solidified, efficiency becomes paramount. With a long planning horizon, I know that finishing early now prevents last-minute panic and ensures I can recover from my sleep debt, which is critical for maintaining future performance.

goals.description: Draft a concise, written protocol outlining task ownership and deadlines to be sent to the group chat once my immediate workload is cleared, formalizing our agreement to prevent future scope creep.
goals.rationale: Quality control and procedural clarity are essential for my academic value system. A subpar submission or ambiguous workflow could damage my reputation within the cohort_3 regardless of how well we negotiated the split. This step secures the long-term stability of our collaboration.
